payload.answer: This looks like a duplicate rather than a conflict: both memories say that Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans. Safe actions available are: link_duplicate to connect the new item to the existing memory, keep_existing to keep only the existing memory, add_anyway to store the new wording separately despite the duplication, edit to revise the new memory before saving, or cancel to take no action.
citations: Existing memory: Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.
New: Sam from Goldman said he likes Bill Evans.

entity_resolution.reason: The new memory appears to express the same fact as the existing memory with only minor wording differences.
